command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "sudo systemctl stop hermes-gateway && sudo pkill -f hermes 2>/dev/null; sleep 5 && sudo systemctl start hermes-gateway && sleep 15 && journalctl -u hermes-gateway --since -20s --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -10"
